summary: Classified the PR inventory shard conservatively using the hydrated preflight artifact as live state. No shared canonical is present; non-security open PRs are kept as independent backlog items, security-marked refs are routed to central security handling, and no close/merge/fix action is planned because this job is plan mode with merge/fix/raise_pr blocked and low-signal closeout disabled.
